meaning: n.作圆之人 <美> 浪子,酒鬼,举止放荡之挥霍者 <英> 卫理公会牧师
examples: Dickon's curious blue eyes grew rounder and rounder.
The young performer boasted himself to be an all-rounder.
They all call me snowball, but I think my head is rounder than the snowball!
Missing influential off-spinner Muttiah Muralitharan, Sri Lanka turned to all-rounder Jayasuriya to provide the spark.
Roughly the height of a labrador, but longer, with rounder head and smaller ears.
